long_name: Primary Organic Carbon Production by All Types of Phytoplankton
description: Vertically integrated total primary (organic carbon) production by phytoplankton.  This should equal the sum of intpdiat+intpphymisc, but those individual components may be unavailable in some models.
Vertically integrated total primary (organic carbon) production by phytoplankton. This should equal the sum of intpdiat+intpphymisc, but those individual components may be unavailable in some models.
cell_methods: area: mean where sea depth: sum where sea (over entire ocean column) time: mean
